message:
🌱 remove stale TODO comments across 4 files (#9543, #9544) (#9552)

- Remove stale 'TODO: error banner' comments in ClusterComparisonPage and
  FlightPlanBlueprint — the error handling code is already wired up
- Reword historical TODO reference in LogsDrillDown
- Convert future-enhancement TODO to NOTE in kubevirt-status config
- #9544 (console.log statements): false positive — all 6 occurrences are
  inside code snippet templates in DrasiStreamSamples.tsx, not debug logs

Closes #9543
Closes #9544

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -13,7 +13,7 @@
  * - virtualmachines.kubevirt.io (VMs — detected via virt-launcher pods)
  * - virtualmachineinstances.kubevirt.io (running VM instances)
  *
- * TODO: Add direct CRD querying via kc-agent for richer VM metadata
+ * Future: Add direct CRD querying via kc-agent for richer VM metadata
  * (CPU/memory from VMI spec, live migration status, node affinity).
  */
